name: pam-os-memory
description: Use PAM-OS local-first long-term memory from Codex.

interface.longDescription: PAM-OS provides local SQLite-backed memory through a Codex skill and MCP tools for preparing context, capturing stable memories, recording behavior choices, and reading profile traits.
defaultPrompt: Use PAM-OS memory for this task.
Remember this project decision in PAM-OS.
Prepare context from PAM-OS before answering.
